programs.title: Pie to Die For: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programs.desc: When Hannah's customer and Delores' theater rival is murdered, Hannah must find her killer in order to save her mother's reputation. Chad and Hannah's romance blossoms.

programs.title: Meet the Killer Parents
programs.desc: A young woman fights to escape her boyfriend's family after learning they're planning to groom her to replace their long-dead daughter.

programs.title: Shifting Gears
programs.desc: Motor City mechanic Jess reluctantly agrees to participate in a car restoration show and is shocked to learn that her ex-boyfriend, Luke, is her main competitor.

programs.title: Carrot Cake Murder: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programs.desc: Much to the dismay of her fiance, Hannah investigates the discovery of a skeleton found amid the rubble of a building that's undergoing renovation.

programs.title: Twisted Neighbor
programs.desc: A cookbook editor moves into a gossipy neighborhood whose residents are obsessed with an app. When one of the neighbors suddenly disappears, the group chat pinpoints her as the prime suspect.

programs.title: For Your Eyes Only
programs.desc: When a British ship is sunk in foreign waters, the world's superpowers begin a feverish race to find its cargo: a nuclear submarine control system. And 007 (Roger Moore) is thrust into one of his most riveting adventures as he rushes to join the search ... and prevent global devastation!
